1: For in thee do I put my trust.
2: Thou art art my Lord: My goodness extendeth extendeth not to thee;
3: And to to the excellent, in whom is is all my delight.
4: Nor take up their names into my lips.
6: Yea, I have a goodly heritage.
7: My reins also instruct me in the night seasons.
8: Because he is he is at my right hand, I shall not be moved.
9: My flesh also shall rest in hope.
10: Neither wilt thou suffer thine Holy One to see corruption.
11: At thy right hand there are there are pleasures for evermore.
